description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker predominantly colored in red with yellow accents and a white sole. The shoe features a synthetic or leather upper with suede overlays on the toe and heel, and two bold yellow chevrons on the side, characteristic of the Hummel brand. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with red laces, and the interior lining is yellow, matching the heel tab and chevrons. The heel displays a white Hummel logo on a yellow background, while the side panel includes the brand name in white. The outsole appears flat and is likely made of rubber, suitable for urban walking or casual sports. Visible signs of wear and dirt are present, especially on the midsole and suede areas, indicating regular use.
description: A red and yellow low-top sneaker with chevron side stripes, standard lacing, and visible signs of wear. Features Hummel branding and a flat white rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing two yellow chevrons, Hummel branding, and red laces on a red and yellow sneaker.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the yellow heel tab with a white Hummel logo and the shoe's interior lining.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying two yellow chevrons and the red upper with yellow accents, no visible branding text.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the red toe box, standard criss-cross lacing, and the yellow tongue lining.
attribute_logo: White Hummel logo on the yellow heel tab, white 'hummel' text on the side panel
